commands.purpose: Table view of facilities. Filterable by tenant, branch, facility_type, sport_category, status. --include-retired shows retired rows; default hides them.
Verbose read of one facility: base fields + availability_json (day-by-day summary) + pricing_json (per-tier breakdown) + active blackouts + active bookings count + revenue trailing-30-day rollup.
Scriptable facility creation (test harness + tenant onboarding). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting.
CLI equivalent of POST /{facility}/blackouts. Cascades: cancels bookings inside the window.
Removes a blackout window. Does NOT restore cascade-cancelled bookings.
Display current pricing_json when called without --set. With --set=/path/to/pricing.json: replace the facility's pricing_json (financial-audit-critical; --dry-run validates + shows diff).
One-shot invocation of ReconcileBookingsAgainstRetiredFacilitiesJob + ReconcileBookingOverlapsJob. --dry-run reports findings without repairing. Every finding is a P1 signal.
Cross-tenant (with --tenant filter) or tenant-scoped booking view. Filter by facility, booker/booked_for user, status, date range.
Support-plane cancel. --force bypasses cancellation_notice_hours (audit-critical). Prompts for confirmation unless --no-interaction.
Support-plane reschedule. Runs the full observer check chain.
Manual no-show. The automated MarkNoShowJob handles the common case; this exists for support intervention.
Day-pass ledger view. --date filters by valid_on_date; --consumed shows only consumed rows.
CLI POS. --user OR --profile-name+--profile-phone required (anonymous walk-in mandate).
Manual pass issue. Wave 4 will auto-issue on Membership provisioning; this covers ad-hoc cases + Wave 2 placeholder testing.
Terminate a pass. Refunds are Finance module's job.
